'''Triebakk''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Politics/Legends|politician]] in the times of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He had become the senior [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] by [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]].

==Biography==
Triebakk became a member of the [[New Republic Advisory Council]], advising [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]]. Triebakk was one of the minority which openly supported the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi Knights]], despite a strong disgruntlement with them after the [[Battle of Osarian|Rhommamool incident]]. In the meetings he sat between Fey'lya and [[Cal Omas]], his closest ally. Triebakk complained directly to senator [[Pwoe]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] and [[Niuk Niuv]] of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] when they were rude to the Jedi.

During the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], Triebakk was one of the Advisory Councilors lost in the planet, and Pwoe quickly declared him dead. However, the Wookiee somehow succeeded in leaving the planet before its [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] and he joined Omas and other surviving politicians on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. Once on Mon Calamari, Triebakk was a firm supporter of Cal Omas, especially when he tried to become the Chief of State. Triebakk tried to convince senator [[Cola Quis]], a candidate without a real chance to win, to give his votes to Omas in exchange of some political favors.

Triebakk was chosen to be a member of the [[High Council (Galactic Alliance)|High Council]], the new Jedi Council formed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and Omas. This new Council consisted of six Jedi and six New Republic representatives, of which Triebakk was the strongest supporter of the Jedi, and a determined opponent of [[Alpha Red (pathogen)|Alpha Red]].
